TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Salva Kiir Mayardit ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 9, Salva Kiir Mayardit, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw South sudan ta' misuw hya' ga Salva Kiir Mayardit, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: s~…ēal*a kiir majar*it rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēal*a kiir majar*it, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēoutńß s~…ēu*an ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēal*a kiir majar*it, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Salva Kiir Mayardit ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 9, Salva Kiir Mayardit, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw South sudan ta' misuw hya' ga Salva Kiir Mayardit, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
